channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Decomposing Mattress that smells rancid left on the street., 18th May
item.description:
A mental ill person is living in the building right next to where this bin is he often defecates on the street and has left a hazardous matters on the street before he is known to the local residents
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Middleton Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Expanding area of sinking road, 18th May
item.description:
Thames water are taking months to address the leak and the pothole is now expanding rapidly with hard edges

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Humber Road, Blackheath
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Gully totally blocked, 18th May
item.description:
Looks solid between bars and can see uncleared leaves

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Humber Road, Blackheath
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Weekend Food truck with diesel generator, 18th May
item.description:
This food truck has a diesel generator continuously pumping fumes on the pavement for hours on end on weekends, with the exhaust at the level of a child's head. This is a serious health and environmental hazard. Easily solved by using electric batteries.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Stoke Newington Church Street, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overgrown vegetation on path, 18th May
item.description:
The overhanging brushes and trees are overgrown which reduce the width of the path severely. The branches are also hanging too low and have ripped my coat.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Burma Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Broken cabinet with loose door, 18th May
item.description:
This electrical cabinet has been broken for a few weeks now and a door panel lies on the pavement. It is about time to clean this clutter and trip hazard and repair the cabinet.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Petherton Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Cycle lane markings faded and bollards missing, 18th May
item.description:
The cycle lane markings are very faded and severall bollards are missing which is making drivers more prone to take the cycle lane. This is becoming more dangerous. Also time to implement a permanent segregated cycle lane.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Green Lanes, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bags of rubbish left under tree, on corner of Steedman Street and Hampton Street., 18th May
item.description:
This is a regular fly-tipping spot.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Steedman Street, Elephant and Castle, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: In front of 88-92 Kilburn High Rd, London NW6 4HS (Sainsburys/Holland and Barrett), 18th May
item.description:
The manhole is still making extremely loud noises every few seconds whenever a car / bus / lorry is driving over it. About a month ago a manhole just next to the broken one was replaced, but the loud one was NOT replaced! When speaking to the construction workers they said they would replace it a few days later, but this has never happened. I have reported this over a year ago here: https://www.fixmystreet.com/report/7736538 The original report has now been closed, but the damaged manhole has not been replaced. Can you please send someone again to repair the loud manhole? It can't be missed as this is really extremely loud. It is very clearly audible with closed windows from my flat.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 88-92, Kilburn High Road, Kilburn, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pile of weeding left on pavement in Elliott’s Row outside Nos. 46/47, 18th May
item.description:
Looks like someone has done some weeding and thought it would be a good idea to leave it on the pavement.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Elliott's Row, Elephant and Castle, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Lamp is still not lighting up properly, 18th May
item.description:
This is the 3rd time of reporting. The lamp isn't working properly and only emitting a very feint light.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Lincoln Green Road, Poverest, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overhanging tree branches blocking public footpath, 18th May
item.description:
The tree branches are hanging right over the public footpath and we had to duck to avoid them as they are so low.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Park Hill Road, Shortlands, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Black ford fiesta abandoned, 18th May
item.description:
Black ford Fiesta has not moved since before Christmas. It has no Mot or Tax Tk13 Dec Parked near to 49 Thorndon close
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Thorndon Close, St Paul's Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fridge freezer flytipped, 18th May
item.description:
Someone has flytipped a fridge freezer behind my garden during the day today.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Glimpsing Green, Upper Belvedere, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
